calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-10-2012 Off Calendar

Request To Set Hearing On Application For Court Judgment; Case Summary
Off Calendar Jul-17-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Donald J. Sullivan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Sonia Wong #11288.
Raymond Alexander, Jr., Esq. for and with the plaintiff Debbie You, was placed under oath and testifies.
Default of Defendant Kenneth Huang has been duly entered.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant as follows:
Cancelling that deed of trust whereon Plaintiff Debbie You is named as "Trustor" and Defendant Kenneth Huang is named as "Beneficiary" and Cacelling the promissory note referred to in said deed of trust such that the instruments are of no further force and effect against the Plaintiff. (see scanned doc for details of the judgment).
Costs - $720.00, Total money judgment $720.00
Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
